reviewReminder.title: Review reminder
reviewReminder.body: Did you try Kimchi Stew? Leave a review.

catalogUpdated.title: Catalog updated
catalogUpdated.body: Jokbal now has curated ingredient data.

welcome.title: Welcome to K-Bap
welcome.body: Scan your first menu to get started.

community.lockedBody: The tab is reserved in the MVP. Boards, comments and per-nationality feeds arrive in phase 2.

scan.hint: Point at a menu and tap to scan
scan.permissionBody: K-Bap needs your camera to scan menus on the spot.
scan.noText: No menu text found. Move closer and try again.
scan.failed: Scan failed. Check your connection and try again.
scan.spikeNote: Spike: risk comes live from the backend (currently a mock).

states.emptyReviewsBody: Be the first to review this dish — your note helps the next traveler eat with confidence.
states.errorBody: We couldn't load this right now. It's on our side, not yours.
states.offlineBody: Connect to the internet to scan menus and load reviews. Your saved scans are still here.
states.unableBody: We don't have enough ingredient data to rate this dish for your profile. Ask the owner before eating.

shell.placeholderNote: Tab content lives in the screen modules
